# Docklys Instructions for GitHub Copilot

@../AI_INSTRUCTIONS.md

Before editing, read [Documentation.md](../Documentation.md) and [AIArchitecture.md](../AIArchitecture.md). Follow their manifest least-privilege and Windows/macOS/Linux-first requirements.

For module publication, package changes, native helpers, or approval failures, read [MODULE_APPROVAL.md](../MODULE_APPROVAL.md).
